reviews.comment:
Buen café  , buenas medialunas, buenísimos los pasteles de membrillo o de batata. Impecable la atención , amabilidad  y simpatía de las chicas. Altamente recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Good coffee, excellent croissants, and delicious quince and sweet potato pastries. The service, kindness, and friendliness of the staff are impeccable. Highly recommended.
